name: fleet operations supervisors managing 10-50 vehicles tool
description: For fleet operations supervisors managing 10-50 vehicles, missed vehicle inspections cause compliance issues. We provide automated reminders instead of manual tracking of inspection schedules.
problem_solved: missed vehicle inspections leading to compliance issues
features: simple dashboard for tracking inspection dates
